steps: 1. The D&D builder is a system for creating and validating D&D 2024 level 1 characters
2. Available tools: dnd-build (create characters), dnd-check (validate sheets), dnd-lookup (find spell/rule info), dnd-help (guidance)
3. All character data comes from the bundled D&D 2024 catalogue, ensuring rules accuracy
4. Choose the skill that matches your task
